fields.title: Frankenstein
fields.author: MARY SHELLEY
fields.description:
Frankenstein - Fiction Novel
15 Years+, 256 Pages, “Mary Shelley’s ‘Frankenstein’ explores the consequences of Victor Frankenstein’s daring act of creating life from corpses. As he grapples with his creation and its repercussions, themes of human connection and alienation emerge in this seminal work of science fiction. Shelley’s tale continues to captivate readers with its profound exploration of ambition and its consequences.”
